name: syntek-rust-security
description: Comprehensive Rust security tooling for Claude Code - threat modeling, vulnerability scanning, cryptographic patterns, and memory-safe development
author: Syntek Studio

agents.name: threat-modeller
agents.description: STRIDE threat analysis for Rust applications

agents.name: vuln-scanner
agents.description: Dependency vulnerability scanning with cargo-audit

agents.name: crypto-reviewer
agents.description: Cryptographic implementation review and timing attack detection

agents.name: memory-safety
agents.description: Unsafe code auditing and memory safety verification

agents.name: fuzzer
agents.description: Fuzzing infrastructure setup (libfuzzer, AFL++, honggfuzz)

agents.name: secrets-auditor
agents.description: Secret detection and secure secrets management

agents.name: supply-chain
agents.description: Supply chain security and dependency provenance

agents.name: pentester
agents.description: Custom penetration testing tool development

agents.name: binary-analyser
agents.description: Binary hardening verification and exploitation analysis

agents.name: compliance-auditor
agents.description: OWASP/CWE compliance reporting

agents.name: rust-version
agents.description: Semantic versioning for Cargo.toml and workspace management

agents.name: rust-docs
agents.description: Rustdoc generation, doc tests, and API documentation

agents.name: rust-gdpr
agents.description: GDPR compliance patterns for Rust services

agents.name: rust-support-articles
agents.description: User-facing documentation for security tools

agents.name: rust-git
agents.description: Git workflows for Rust projects (Cargo.lock strategies)

agents.name: rust-refactor
agents.description: Rust-specific refactoring (trait extraction, unsafe reduction)

agents.name: rust-review
agents.description: Code review with clippy, rustfmt, and API guidelines

agents.name: rust-test-writer
agents.description: Unit tests, doc tests, property-based testing

agents.name: rust-benchmarker
agents.description: Performance benchmarking with criterion.rs

agents.name: rust-dependency-manager
agents.description: Cargo dependency and feature flag management

agents.name: rust-unsafe-minimiser
agents.description: Reduce unsafe blocks and verify safety invariants

agents.name: rust-api-designer
agents.description: Public API design following Rust API guidelines

skills.name: vuln-scan
skills.description: Scan Rust project for known vulnerabilities

skills.name: memory-audit
